title: Gamble Inc. Featured in Games Ardor!
content: We are thrilled to announce that Gamble Inc. has been featured in Games Ardor's article on the **[Top Steam Games to Look Out for in June 2026](https://gamesardor.net/top-steam-games-to-look-out-for-in-june-2026/)**!

They highlighted our corporate dystopia atmosphere and satisfying slot-spinning progression system: *'The fun comes from slowly turning the system in your favor and seeing each upgrade make a noticeable difference.'*
A huge thank you to Games Ardor for the shout-out! If you haven't already, check out the article and don't forget to play our demo on Steam!

title: Gamble Inc. Demo is Live!
content: We are incredibly excited to announce that the demo for **Gamble Inc.** is officially live! You can now download the demo and give us feedback!

title: Steam Page for our new game is live!
content: Gamble Inc. is an incremental slot-spinning game set in a corporate dystopia where you are fighting to escape the matrix!
Will you climb the ladder and escape to the real world, or will you be trapped in the simulation forever?

title: Welcome to the New Digital Umami Site!
content: Welcome to our new home on the web! We've redesigned our landing page to make it easier for players to find our games, subscribe to our newsletter, and follow our development journey.
Make sure to join our newsletter if you want to get monthly development updates and exclusive beta invitations directly in your inbox.
